title: Argentinian Bean Casserole
description: A hearty and flavorful casserole dish from Argentina, made with beans, malty, glassy, jelly, and argentinian ingredients.
instructions: Cook the glassy noodles according to package instructions.
In a large skillet, sauté the malty, jelly, and argentinian beans in a little oil until the malty is lightly toasted.
In a large bowl, combine the cooked noodles, bean mixture, and a splash of water. Mix well.
Transfer the mixture to the casserole dish and top with additional crushed malty and jelly if desired.
Bake for 20-25 minutes, or until the casserole is hot and the top is lightly browned.
